drone.label: drone
checks: Does the camera gimbal move freely?
drone.inspect: Visually inspect the drone for chassis cracks, chipped or bent propellers, camera lens scratches, gimbal assembly damage, battery swelling, and verify the serial number sticker is intact.

smarts.label: smart device
photoGuide: serial number or MAC address sticker
checks: Is the user account unlinked/factory reset?
smarts.inspect: Inspect the display for cracks or deep scratches, the outer casing for dents or scuffs, the charging ports for debris or damage, and confirm the device is fully unpaired and reset to factory settings.

smart.label: smart device
smart.inspect: Inspect for screen scratches or cracks, housing dents or scuffs, damaged ports, signs of moisture exposure, and ensure the screen and indicators light up when powered.

smartsw.label: smartwatch
checks: Are the original charger and straps included?
smartsw.inspect: Check the screen and casing for scratches, cracks, or dents, inspect the band and buckle for wear or tearing, look for dirt or corrosion in the charging contacts, and verify that the display turns on without distortion.

smartwatc.label: smartwatch
photoGuide: serial number on device or settings screen
smartwatc.inspect: Inspect the screen for cracks, scratches, or dead pixels, examine the outer casing and bezel for scuffs or dents, check the band and clasp for wear or damage, and verify that the sensors and charging contacts are clean and free of corrosion.

sma.label: smartwatch or fitness tracker
photoGuide: serial number on device or box
sma.inspect: screen scratches or cracks, sensor lens damage, strap wear or tears, charging contact corrosion, and whether the serial number matches the box.
